TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cu ki ngo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 337 buwan, 843 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 134 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 709 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cu ki ngo hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Himoti. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cu ki ngo ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ħimoti. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cu ki ngo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 337 buwan, 843 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 134 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 709 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cu ki ngo hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Himoti. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cu ki ngo ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨipuruŋan. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ħjaʔ ɣa ħimoti. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
